post.description: Authenticates a player and returns a JWT token for subsequent API calls.

get.description: Returns the details of the company specified in the 'tradewinds-company-id' header.

403.description: Not a director of this company

get.description: Returns the profile of the currently authenticated player.
Returns the health status of the application, including database connectivity and Oban job lag.

post.description: Executes a trade directly without a quote.
